Title: Scaffold repo with kubebuilder v4
Body: Run kubebuilder init --domain kanary.io --repo github.com/<org>/kanary. Commit initial structure. Acceptance: repo builds with `make build`.

Title: Commit SPEC.md and BACKLOG.md
Body: Add SPEC.md (this spec) and BACKLOG.md to repo root. Set CODEOWNERS for SPEC.md.

Title: Create ADR-001: No replacement for Deployment
Body: Record the decision not to create a CRD that replaces Deployment. See SPEC §3.

Title: Add Makefile with build/test/lint/manifests/helm-lint
Body: Standard Makefile targets. Must run on Linux and macOS.

Title: Configure golangci-lint
Body: Add .golangci.yml with enabled linters and pre-commit hooks.

Title: Bootstrap GitHub Project from issues.csv
Body: Create Project (v2), add custom fields Milestone/Priority/Area and import all issues.

Title: Define CanarySpec and CanaryStatus types
Body: Fields per SPEC §4.1. Include validation markers.

Title: Validation webhook for Canary
Body: Ensure targetRef points to existing Deployment; steps weights are monotonic.

Title: Reconcile canary Deployment copy
Body: Create and manage canary Deployment as copy of target with 1 replica and owner ref.

Title: Reconcile stable/canary Services
Body: Create stable and canary Services targeting selectors by revision label.

Title: Support kanary.io/promote, abort, paused, canary-enabled annotations
Emit Kubernetes Events on transitions
Body: Normal/Warning events for each state transition.

Title: Add --watch-namespaces flag
Body: Cluster/list/single. Acceptance: memory footprint reduced in namespaced mode.

Title: Scaffold Helm chart
Body: charts/kanary with CRDs, Deployment, RBAC, Service, ServiceMonitor, PrometheusRule.

Title: Helm values for providers enable flags
Helm lint & test in CI
Body: Fail PR on helm lint errors.

Title: Publish Helm chart to GH Pages on release
Workflow release.yaml
Body: Multi-arch images, GHCR, SBOM, cosign, chart publish.

Title: Composite action standard-deploy with enable-canary toggle
Body: Turns off canary via annotation then kubectl rollout.

Title: Implement DatadogProvider
Body: Metrics v2 API with secret-based auth.

Title: Progressive mode in reconciler
Body: Auto-advance on pass, rollback on fail.

Title: Minimal RBAC per scope
Body: Role vs ClusterRole based on scope.

Title: Design doc citing Go in Action chapters 7–11
MkDocs Material site on GH Pages
